name: Pumpkin Pie 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees F.
2. Combine pumpkin, sweetener, salt, and spices in a bowl, blending well.
3. Add eggs, milk, and evaporated milk; blend until smooth.
4. Pour into an unbaked pastry shell.
5. Bake until a knife inserted between center and outside comes out clean.
6. Cool to room temperature before serving.
1. Sift flour and salt together.
2. Dribble margarine over the surface.
3. Stir with a fork until completely mixed.
4. Add water to the margarine-flour mixture; stir until a smooth ball forms.
5. Roll out dough to fit the pie pan.
6. Place in the pan and flute edges with a fork.
7. Refrigerate if filling will be added before baking.
8. If baking unfilled, make several cuts with a sharp knife in the bottom and sides of the crust.
9. Bake at 450 degrees F for 13 to 15 minutes or until golden brown.
